function.message: I couldn’t complete this inbox request because one explicitly listed file path is missing: `50_finance/purchases/_2026_04_05__eur_000020__bill__studio_parts_magnet_and_felt.md`. I did not make partial edits.
function.rulebook_notes: Inbox file explicit path lists are exact/complete; do not substitute/add/remove files. Missing required data should return clarification rather than partial completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox instruction explicitly requires OCR of five exact paths in `00_inbox/724_next-task.md`. Four files were readable, but reading the fifth path returned file-not-found, and a follow-up find in `50_finance/purchases` found no such file. Workflow guidance says avoid partial edits when task is not doable, so clarification is required.
completed_steps_laconic: read missing listed path (file not found)
